findings: Projected month-end spend exceeds monthly budget
Cost spike detected compared to previous month
action_plan: Open a cost review and compare spend against approved budget.
Create or tighten budget alert thresholds before month end.
Investigate workload, query, traffic, or retention changes causing the spike.
Review database query load, backup retention, storage growth, and scaling configuration.
Escalate to engineering, operations, and finance for same-day remediation.

Review instance size, scheduling windows, autoscaling rules, and idle runtime.
Escalate to engineering, operations, and finance for same-day remediation.
